client.name: Anastasiya Karaneuskaya
client.label: Multilingual operations specialist with live operations, warehouse logistics, KPI management, ERP workflows, and team training experience

core_positioning.notes: Best fit is operations specialist, operations analyst, logistics coordinator, supply chain operations, customer/service operations, and process improvement roles. Position honestly as a multilingual operations operator with KPI, SLA, live ops, warehouse documentation, ERP, and training strengths. Avoid finance-heavy, SAP-dependent, SQL-heavy, procurement negotiation, and advanced analytics roles per source guidance.

summary_base: Multilingual operations specialist with 4+ years across live operations and warehouse logistics environments in Poland and Belarus, supporting real-time operations, order flows, and outbound documentation at scale.

Strongest evidence includes exceeding operational KPI targets by 60%, maintaining 100% quality scores, training roughly 40 new hires, supervising 30+ agents, and supporting approximately 3,000 daily orders across 2 active markets.

Brings ERP fluency, KPI and SLA management, escalation handling, process optimisation, warehouse documentation, cross-functional coordination, and strong multilingual capability for international operations teams.

experience.summary: Global food delivery platform (~20,000 employees). Oversees real-time courier operations across the Netherlands and Denmark during off-hours, deputising for senior management on weekly rotation.
highlights: **Cut roughly 50 avoidable order cancellations per day** by building an updated city closing schedule, securing senior approval, and reducing compensation-triggering errors while saving approximately 30 minutes of manual checking daily across a 60+ person team.

**Trained around 40 new hires with zero negative feedback** across onboarding and buddy sessions, including designing an evening training module that closed a recurring knowledge gap for approximately 5 new agents per month.
**Supervised 30+ agents during senior-level shifts** while handling escalations, task distribution, and real-time dashboard monitoring for approximately 3,000 daily orders across 2 markets.
**Eliminated 3-4 outdated procedures** by auditing the internal knowledge base, validating process gaps with agents, and submitting recommendations later adopted by management.
**Improved routine incident handling through bot-launch support** by contributing to a cross-functional automation project that reduced manual handling of standard operational issues.

experience.summary: Promoted to Live Operations Specialist within 12 months based on sustained KPI performance and quality results in a high-volume live operations environment.
highlights: **Exceeded courier inquiry resolution KPI by 60%** by building deep operational knowledge within 2 months and developing a faster workflow for live chat and phone support across 80+ daily issues.
**Maintained 100% quality scores from month 2 onward** while sustaining SLA compliance approximately 15% above target and recording zero quality failures after onboarding.

**Resolved critical live incidents in real time** including courier safety, theft, and harassment escalations while coordinating with customer service and courier coordination teams to maintain service continuity.

experience.summary: National importer and distributor of stationery and office supplies (~150 warehouse staff, 500+ across the parent group). Promoted from labeler to warehouse logistics specialist within 2 months.
highlights: **Processed 300+ delivery notes and invoices per day** while maintaining documentation accuracy across 1,000+ outbound orders and preparing CMR paperwork for international shipments.

**Handled triple workload with zero errors for one week** when 3 of 5 department members fell ill, issuing approximately 4,000 delivery notes and warehouse documents solo while keeping all drivers on schedule.
**Exceeded operational KPIs by up to 30%** on document processing speed, contributing to faster driver turnaround and smoother warehouse flow during high-volume periods.
**Onboarded warehouse staff on ERP system 1C procedures** after 12 months of tenure while also managing 40+ daily self pick-up client transactions with full documentation accuracy.

experience.summary: Food and beverage wholesale distributor. Short-term role prior to planned international relocation to Poland, with direct reporting to the CEO.
highlights: **Managed end-to-end warehouse documentation flow** across delivery notes, invoices, picking lists, and consolidation lists to support accurate order fulfilment and on-time driver distribution.
**Coordinated daily ERP-based order processing** while issuing CMR documents for international shipments and handling client self pick-up documentation with full outbound accuracy.

education.note: Expected 2026 | Rector's Scholarship | Erasmus+ Scholarship (AI in Tertiary Sectors, France) | GPA: 4.8/5.0

certifications: Supply Chain Operations (In Progress — Expected May 2026)
